project_context.target_audience: Security guards and private security workers in Spain (2026 agreement)
project_context.aesthetic: DASHBOARDS & ADMIN PANELS - The Performance Pro (Tactical Minimalism)

design_system.theme: Dual Light/Dark theme. Default to Dark Mode for eye comfort during night shifts, but ensure Light Mode has high contrast for payroll/PDF exports.

typography.rules: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Headings must use tracking-tight. Data/numbers must use tabular-nums. Labels must be uppercase and tracking-[0.15em].

layout.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for containers. Grid gaps should be tight (gap-1 to gap-4) to simulate data density.
layout.dashboard_grid: Bento layout: grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-12. Main calendar spans 8 cols. Sidebar (payroll/upcoming) spans 4 cols.
layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment. Never center-align paragraphs or data.

surfaces.calendar: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). 1px border-collapse style.
surfaces.cards: Solid flat colors. 1px border. No soft shadows. Sharp or max rounded-md.

motion.rules: No 'transition: all'. Use explicit 'transition-colors' or 'transition-transform'. Add micro-interactions (hover:scale-[1.02]) for shift chips. Pulse animation for active alarms.

calendar.instructions: Custom Grid (grid-cols-7). Do not use Shadcn for the main calendar layout, only for date pickers. Days must be customizable with color chips.
calendar.shift_chips: Use tactile neumorphism or flat high-contrast blocks. Display start/end time, overtime dot, and alarm icon if active.

forms.instructions: Use Shadcn UI. Override default rounded-md to rounded-sm. Focus rings must be brand_navy or brand_green.

toasts.instructions: Use sonner for notifications (e.g., alarm triggers, shift saves).

features_implementation.payroll_calculator: Must format numbers in Euros (€). Use strictly tabular-nums.
features_implementation.alarm: Browser Notification API. Indicate visually on the UI with a glowing brand_orange or brand_green bell icon.
features_implementation.pdf_export: Ensure the exported layout strips dark mode and uses high-contrast black on white.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 text contrast. White text on colored shift chips.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="calendar-day-15"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 2026 Spanish Private Security Collective Agreement logic inside the frontend calculations or backend API.
Night hours (22:00-06:00) require intersection calculation with shift times.
Holiday hours require checking weekends and 2026 Spanish National Holidays.
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
Add GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js
